My name is Ese and I’m having my Magazine Launch for Pure Collectives Magazine on May 16th. And as part of the entertainment we are having a mini runway with some designs.

So I’m calling all models to apply so we can have a model cast.

This is the process;

1. Fill out this form and questionnaire: 
https://forms.gle/vAYLHJzF4xQiVZaW9

2. We prepare a shortlist and invite you for a physical casting 

3. You attend the casting and we have our selection.

If you’re interested or have any questions you can fill the form and/or DM me on Instagram @fj.omasanuwa

Thank you all

items.text:
CASTING CALL - “The Sins of Our Father” - NON-UNION

Hi everyone! My name is Emma and I’m the associate producer for the upcoming feature film The Sins of Our Father. We are still looking to cast 2 roles!

Filming will be taking place mid May to mid August, every second weekend approximately (tentatively), in the greater Vancouver area. It is a volunteer project (with IMDb credit, meals provided, copy, and great company).

If you are interested in being apart of this amazing project please email your demo reel, resume, and the name of the character you’re auditioning for to thesinsofourfatherfilm@gmail.com by Wednesday April 8th.

Synopsis:

The Sins of Our Father dissects the crumbling legacy of the Montgomery family in a narrative that blends gritty family drama with surreal, lo-fi sci-fi.

The story begins with Clive, a dying pawnshop owner and lifelong hustler who attempts one final con: using a mysterious, memory-altering projector to force a reconciliation with his estranged children. With his twisted understanding of fatherhood, he plans to "overwrite" their trauma to stage one final, perfect memory.

The film unfolds in an exploration of the fallouts with his three children: Maddie, the eldest, paralyzed by the fear of inheriting her father’s toxicity; Leland, a debt-ridden filmmaker shooting adult content to survive; and Julian, a recluse who has signed a "deal with the devil" by accepting tuition sponsorship from Clive’s ruthless rival, Vance.

The plan shatters when Clive misuses the device. As the siblings uncover the truth, their own demons collide with external threats—including Vance and a gang of "trustafarian" loan sharks—who descend on the family home to seize the mysterious projector.

In a chaotic climax that blurs the line between memory and reality, the siblings must weaponize the device to escape. Ultimately, Clive makes the only selfless choice of his life, resulting in his children finally being free.

Unbothered. debt to dangerous "trustafarians" Leland, who is director of adult content, is the result of Clive pushing him too hard to succeed in field he wasn't interested in; now, having taken huge risk by pursuing filmmaking, he is paralyzed, afraid that his unsuccessful filmmaking career will prove Clive right.'

items.text:
Casting Call for Blackburn College film project (6-minute post-apocalyptic, rom-com short film) 'Big Mistake'

I will be casting for the characters of Mallory (18-30 year old female) and Sam (18-30 year old male) please let me know if there would be anyone interested.

Synopsis: Sam and Mal fall in love surviving chaos together. But moving in together turns their romance into a nonstop, absurd battle of bickering, with fights escalating over everything. So, when a zombie crashes through their front door, will they finally team up, or keep fighting each other?

Filming would take place in Blackburn around Griffin Park for 2/3 days between the 15th and the 26th of April! Please message for more info if you are interested in the role and I can share more about the characters and script.

This project is a college film so is non-profit, although we can discuss covering costs for transportation if needed.

topComments.text: My son would be interested , he is 18 and a theatre student

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting for our summer production of
The Wind In The Willows! 🌿🐸

Whether you're a wise badger, an eccentric toad, or a mischievous stoat - we welcome all down to the river bank!

For more information, or to request our audition pack, please email us at noisycowcommunitytheatre@gmail.com 

Our in person audition will take place on Sunday the 12th of April, 6pm 'till 8pm, at our studio in The Ridings Centre, Wakefield City Centre.

We will also be accepting self tapes, the deadline for this will be Sunday the 12th of April at 6pm.

Good luck!
.
#theatre #production #acting #casting #castingcall

items.text:
Actor wanted from Midlands/North England- Filming in Manchester but travel will be paid for- £20/hour (both travel expenses and time spent travelling paid for). 

I am looking for an actor who, in real life, has been bullied and is comfortable speaking about their own lived experience. There will be both an acting scene (fictional) as well as a voiceover section of you speaking about your lived experience. 

Preference to somebody 18-30 but can be any age.  Regarding the bullying, looking for somebody who was bullying was connected to a disability or personal characteristic or disability (e.g. LGBTQ+). Video will be used as part of mental health awareness/awareness around  cyberbullying. 

Filming will likely be in May/June either on a weekday morning/weekend.

topComments.text: I'm interested, but how many hours would shoot be?

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję odtwórców do następujacych ról:

1. Klaudia Marchlewska (23) – młoda matka, dwa lata po ślubie z Mikołajem. Marzy o dużej rodzinie, ale jest bardzo zmęczona po urodzeniu pierwszego dziecka, tęskni za czasem spędzonym z Mikołajem. Ładna, ale widocznie przemęczona. Bardzo uczuciowa, źle znosi stres.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

2. Mikołaj Marchlewski (27) – młody ojciec, zakochany w córce i żonie. Fajny, uczuciowy facet. Trochę narwany, ale z sercem na dłoni. Wysoki, wysportowany. Chętnie trochę dłuższe włosy. 

Data: 22., 23. i 24. kwietnia
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

3. Dorota (32) – przemęczona, nadużywająca alkoholu matka trójki dzieci. Pogubiona, nie zna umiaru. Kocha dzieci, ale przez alkohol i złe wzorce ze swojego dzieciństwa, nie potrafi się nimi odpowiednio zająć.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 100 zł netto za całość

4. Emil (36) – mąż Doroty. Lubi wygodne życie, dzieci mu trochę przeszkadzają, choć je kocha. Ma bardzo luźne podejście, nic go nie martwi, niczym się nie przejmuje. Z brzuszkiem – lubi zjeść i popić.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

5. Gangus (35-45) – człowiek Bizona. Głośny, ordynarny. Zbyt pewny siebie, przestaje być czujny. Nabity, wysoki. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 500 zł netto

6. Suchy (26) – młody, zagubiony. Nie skończył szkoły i nie mógł znaleźć pracy, dlatego wpakował się w szemrane interesy. Nie zdaje sobie sprawy, kim jest Bizon i czym tak naprawdę się zajmuje. Kocha dzieci swojej siostry, nie mógłby porwać żadnego dzieciaka. Przyjemny w odbiorze, przysadzisty, ogolony na łyso. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

7. Bizon (42) – szef szajki. Niebezpieczny, choć niepozorny. Dawniej prawie poszedł siedzieć za handel ludźmi, czuje się bezkarny, nikt nie może udowodnić mu winy. Skupiony na sobie i swoim biznesie, z nastawieniem po trupach do celu. Szczupły i wysoki.

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość

8. Kostek (35-40) – gangus, bliski współpracownik Bizona. Nie lubi go, ale go szanuje – docenia „ludzi sukcesu”, kasę zawsze chętnie przyjmie. Przysadzisty. 

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu
items.summary:
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję odtwórców do następujacych ról:

1. Klaudia Marchlewska (23) – młoda matka, dwa lata po ślubie z Mikołajem. Marzy o dużej rodzinie, ale jest bardzo zmęczona po urodzeniu pierwszego dziecka, tęskni za czasem spędzonym z Mikołajem. Ładna, ale widocznie przemęczona. Bardzo uczuciowa, źle znosi stres.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

2. Mikołaj Marchlewski (27) – młody ojciec, zakochany w córce i żonie. Fajny, uczuciowy facet. Trochę narwany, ale z sercem na dłoni. Wysoki, wysportowany. Chętnie trochę dłuższe włosy. 

Data: 22., 23. i 24. kwietnia
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

3. Dorota (32) – przemęczona, nadużywająca alkoholu matka trójki dzieci. Pogubiona, nie zna umiaru. Kocha dzieci, ale przez alkohol i złe wzorce ze swojego dzieciństwa, nie potrafi się nimi odpowiednio zająć.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 100 zł netto za całość

4. Emil (36) – mąż Doroty. Lubi wygodne życie, dzieci mu trochę przeszkadzają, choć je kocha. Ma bardzo luźne podejście, nic go nie martwi, niczym się nie przejmuje. Z brzuszkiem – lubi zjeść i popić.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

5. Gangus (35-45) – człowiek Bizona. Głośny, ordynarny. Zbyt pewny siebie, przestaje być czujny. Nabity, wysoki. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 500 zł netto

6. Suchy (26) – młody, zagubiony. Nie skończył szkoły i nie mógł znaleźć pracy, dlatego wpakował się w szemrane interesy. Nie zdaje sobie sprawy, kim jest Bizon i czym tak naprawdę się zajmuje. items.text:
GDYNIA!!! **CASTING DZIECIĘCY – FILMY DYPLOMOWE** 

Jesteśmy studentami szkoły filmowej w Gdyni i realizujemy nasze filmy dyplomowe! Szukamy dzieci do ról w krótkich fabularnych produkcjach tworzonych w ramach studiów, pod opieką doświadczonych reżyserów i wykładowców. 

**Poszukujemy:**

 **dziewczynka (7–12 lat)**

 **dziewczynka (6–10 lat)**

 **chłopiec (10–13 lat)**

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego — liczy się naturalność, swoboda przed kamerą i chęć udziału w projekcie filmowym!

 **Zgłoszenia:** Prosimy wysyłać na maila: **casting.gsf@op.pl**

W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
* Krótki opis dziecka
* Aktualne zdjęcie
* Wiek dziecka
* Miasto zamieszkania

Zapraszamy do wspólnej przygody z kinem! 

DODATKOWE INFO TEL. 570654349

ZGŁOSZENIA NA MAILA: casting.gsf@op.pl pl'

sharedPost.text:
🎭✨ BIG NEWS ✨🎭

We’re so excited to announce our brand NEW Transition Year programme in partnership with Ashfield College!

Now you can combine top-class academic learning with professional Musical Theatre training.  The perfect balance of education and creativity with both studio and real, in school academic excellence  💫

🎶 Train in singing, acting & dance
📚 Achieve excellence in your academic studies preparing you for Leaving Cert and beyond 
🌟 Build confidence, skills & lifelong friendships

If you’ve ever dreamed of performing while staying on track academically, this is YOUR moment.

🎟️ Limited places available so don’t miss out! Open day and Registration info coming soon. 

#transitionyear #musicaltheatre #performingarts #tyireland #fulltime

items.text:
SPEC AD CASTING:

Casting for a short, intimate commercial spec project shooting in London and looking for a lead.

**Project:** Spec Ad for Japanese food brand

**Shoot Date:** Saturday 11 April evening
**Location:** SE London
**Rate:** £100 + transport covered + on-set food

**Role:**
East Asian actor (mid 20s), Japanese preferred but not required.

A young professional living alone in London, coming home after work and cooking a simple meal. This is a subtle, performance-driven role with minimal dialogue - the story is told through small, natural moments rather than overt acting.

**Looking for:**
* Strong natural presence on camera
* Comfortable with understated, internal performance
* Able to convey emotion through small expressions and behaviour

Japanese language ability is a bonus but not essential.

This is a self-funded spec project with a focus on high production value and festival submissions.

If interested, please send:
* Headshot
* Showreel (if available)
* Current location

to **evolvevisualsfilms@gmail.com**

Thanks!

topComments.text: I’m interested and I’m based in london

items.title: SPEC AD CASTING:

items.text:
CASTING FOR A SURREALIST DRAMA SHORT FILM!!

DATES: 24th-26th APRIL

ROLE: April (Female, playing age 25-30, black): 

Our protagonist's sister, April acted as a sort of parental figure, "the brave one", to Aria throughout their childhood growing up with neglectful parents. They have shared trauma that has cemented their bond - they were not only sisters but best friends. 

LOGLINE: What begins as a normal conversation on an ordinary day takes an unexpected turn, leaving Aria lost in a world of her own and forced to confront the reality she has been avoiding since a recent tragedy. 

Unpaid, food & travel covered. 

Please email halfcoatproductions@gmail.com with spotlight/showreel!

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Method Acting «Die sieben grossen Emotionen»

Letzte Plätze!!!

Du willst:
* die sieben global verbreiteten Emotionen Glück, Trauer, Wut, Angst, Überraschung, Ekel und Verachtung erarbeiten
* die sieben grossen Emotionen in unterschiedlichen Übungen, Improvisationen, Monologen und Szenen ausprobieren und anwenden
* diese Emotionen zuverlässig abrufen, halten, in der Intensität und Dauer variieren und auch wieder aus ihnen aussteigen können
* die Fähigkeit erlernen, in Zukunft alle gewünschten Emotionen schauspielerisch zu entwickeln
* die neuesten Erkenntnissen der Emotionen-Forschung integrieren
* Von mehr als 40 Jahren Erfahrung profitieren

Dann ist dieser Kurs genau das richtige für DICH!

Und das sagen Teilnehmer*innen:

„Für mich stellt der Schauspiel Unterricht auch ein sehr guter Ausgleich zu meinem Büro-Dasein dar und es macht mir viel Spass während des kreativen Prozesses neue Seiten an mir zu entdecken und mich selber und andere (fiktive) Personen besser kennenzulernen. Liebe Grüsse und grosses Lob an dich; ich bin immer wieder begeistert darüber, wie du uns in verschiedene Situationen und Emotionen „hineinreden“ kannst.“ M.

„Vielen Dank für die tollen Kursabende, ich konnte viel lernen und ausprobieren!“ S.

„Du machst es super mit uns allen und die entstehende energy tut mir sehr gut.“ M-R.

„Danke vielmals für Deine Infos und die Lektüre. Es war für mich eine lehrreiche und intensive Zeit. Ich habe Dir gerne zugehört, da Du die Inhalte klar, strukturiert und interessant auf Augenhöhe vermittelt hast. Auch hat mir das Zusammenspiel oder Wirken mit den anderen Teilnehmern gefallen, sei es in den Vorbereitungen oder in den Szenen. Auch einen Einblick hinter die Kulissen zu bekommen, fand ich sehr spannend.“ N.

„Ich werde es nicht los, mich wenigstens schriftlich nochmals bei Dir zu melden und von Herzen für Deine Worte und Dein Verständnis zu bedanken.

Als ich gestern um 18:30 in den Kurs kam, war ich am Anschlag, ohne Energie und völlig ausgelaugt und als ich um … den Zug nach … nahm, spürte ich in mir wieder ein bisschen Leben und positive Energie. Und das war nicht das erste Mal. Bis jetzt war es nach jedem Kurs so. Einfach um Dir zu sagen, dass dein Kurs mir sehr viel bedeutet und auch sehr viel gibt. Ich habe jetzt schon unglaublich viel gelernt, insbesondere auch über mich.“ M.

„Deine Hilfe ist unverzichtbar damit ich … mein Talent in Zukunft als Schauspieler unter Beweis stellen kann!“ P.

„Your training helped, Marco. A teammate told me it was „like real method acting“. I told them I took method acting. They didn’t know that when hiring me.“ A.

(Die Testimonials sind aus Datenschutzgründen anonymisiert. Du willst noch mehr Testimonials? Dann lese auf der Website und auf Google weiter.)

Du willst es genau wissen. Auf der Website findest du alles, was du brauchst:
* Alle Details zum Kurs
* Testimonials / Bewertungen
* Die Anmeldung

ZES Zentrum für Entwicklung im Schauspiel, das Kompetenzzentrum für Gefühle, Emotionen, Stimmungen und Atmosphären

https://zes-info.ch/die-7-grossen-emotionen/

items.text:
BIG GUYS AGENCY welcomes Troy Faruk to the roster.

With over 15 years of experience in film and television, Troy brings authentic tactical movement, stunt expertise, and commanding on-screen presence.

A military veteran with a background in high-impact action, wire work, stunt coordination, and tactical choreography, Troy is built for roles that demand realism — from federal agents and detectives to military operators and intelligence specialists.

Casting inquiries:
BIG GUYS AGENCY

#TacticalActors #MilitaryActors #LawEnforcementRoles #ActionActors #StuntActors #OnScreenAuthority #FilmCasting #TVActors #BuiltForAction #BGAActors #CastingDirectors

items.text:
ISO: Male actor, 30's, Comedy shooting THIS Wednesday in DTLA.
Hey everyone! I'm shooting pickups for a short comedy I'm directing/wrote/producing. Shooting THIS Wednesday April 8th 12pm-2pm in DTLA. Will be about an hour. Paid + credit!

Production company is GTE Productions (SXSW, Sitges, Cannes, Apple, Hulu + more).

MR. TRENCHCOAT WITH HANDLEBARS (M, 30’s), think hipster meets a California cowboy type wearing a trench coat and rocking a handlebar mustache. Open ethnicity and open to tattoos, piercing, etc. JUST must have permission from tattoo artists. Also, open to influencer/content creator types.

Basically, this is a funny flash back scene. All SOC, no lines but a character moment.

Please email info@gteproductionsinc.com with headshot.

THANK YOU!

There’s an **exclusive virtual talent event** coming up featuring legendary casting director Ricky Masler, with **350+ IMDb credits** and years of real industry experience.

She’s hosting a **live Q&A on April 15th**, and it’s a great opportunity to hear directly from someone who’s been on the casting side at a high level.

These kinds of sessions are where you really start to understand:
– What casting directors are actually looking for
– Common mistakes actors make
– How to stand out in auditions

It’s also a chance to ask your own questions and get real, unfiltered insight.

Spots are limited since it’s a more exclusive event.

If anyone’s interested in attending or wants more details, feel free to comment or message me 👍

items.text:
Casting Call - A Curated Exit (Theatre, paid, non-union)
**Production Company**

Shot in the Dark Productions

**Producer(s)**

Kristy Woollam and Richard White

**Director:**

Richard White

**Union Status**

Non-Union

**Project Type**

Theatre / Live Performance

**Compensation Details**

Profit Share

**Performance Date(s) and Locations**

Winnipeg International Fringe Festival July 13-26, 2026

Edmonton International Fringe Festival August 11-23, 2026

Vancouver - 3 night run, fall 2026 (TBD)

**Submission Deadline**

April 8th, 2026

**Audition Dates and Location**

Vancouver. Call backs week of April 20 - 26th.

**Submission Instructions**

Please contact Kristywoollam@gmail.com to receive sides for a self tape.

Please submit your headshot, acting resume, and self tape to Kristywoollam@gmail.com.

**Project Synopsis**

A Curated Exit is a one act contemporary drama with strong comedic elements. It examines grief, love, and the commercialization of death. Zoe, a funeral director, sells The Device, nanotechnology that vaporizes the body at death and replaces it with a programmed experience. When her husband Steve dies suddenly, Zoe's quest to craft perfect endings collides with loss, memory, and the fragile line between technology and humanity.

**Casting for:**

STEVE Male lead. Any ethnicity. Age 30-50. Steve is a high school history teacher. He's a geek and loves pop culture. He is gentle and playful and often uses jokes to deflect direct questions about his emotions. He has a strong sense of social justice. Steve loves his wife deeply, but dies suddenly without telling her his biggest secret.

items.text:
Open Call: A Visual Letter To Your Animal
Hi everyone,

I’m hosting a community screening of Paws Land (毛家) at The Cinematheque in Vancouver on May 23, and adding a showcase before the film.

We’re inviting 20-second video pieces for a segment called "A Visual Letter to Your Animal”

If you could say something to your animal, what would it be?
Not looking for polished productions or heavy editing. 

Just something sincere, intentional, or creative.

Selected works will be screened in the cinema before Paws Land 

Submission details:
- 20 seconds
- Landscape
- 1920 × 1080
- MP4 or MOV
- Deadline: April 26, 2026

If you have something that fits, or want to create something small for this, we would love to see it.

More details + submission: https://wcculturallab.ca/?p=698

Presented by West Coast Cultural Lab | Media Partner: Vancouver On Ink

Poszukuję charyzmatycznych osób do realizacji nagrań wideo w formacie TikTok dla akcesoriów samochodowych (dywaniki). Jeśli czujesz się swobodnie przed kamerą i lubisz tematykę automotive – to zlecenie dla Ciebie!
Szczegóły zlecenia:
• Data zdjęć: 14.04
• Czas pracy: ok. 6 -8 godzin max
• Lokalizacja: Myjnia samochodowa + plener
• Formuła: Sondy/opiniowanie, filmy eksperckie, testy jakości i wytrzymałości dywaników.
Kogo szukamy?
• Wiek: 22–30 lat (dziewczyny i chłopaki).
• Język: Polski (Native Speaker) – wymagana bardzo dobra dykcja
• Profil: Osoba kontaktowa, która nie boi się podchodzić do ludzi i potrafi ciekawie opowiadać o produkcie.
Wynagrodzenie:
• 700 PLN za dzień zdjęciowy - gotówka po planie ✅🎬🎥
Zgłoszenia:
Prosimy o przesłanie aplikacji na adres e-mail:tatianamakhdi@gmail.com
Temat - Auto 
W wiadomości należy podać:
1. Imię i nazwisko
2. Wiek
3. Wzrost
4. Numer telefonu
Wymagane załączniki:
• Kilka aktualnych zdjęć (twarz i sylwetka).
• Wizytówka w języku polskim – w formie linku do YouTube (warunek konieczny).

Here’s a professional and clear casting call you can use:

**🎬 CASTING CALL – MALE ACTOR (ALBANIAN SPEAKING)**

We are casting for a short film and are looking for a **male actor who speaks Albanian** for a key role.

**Role Details:**
* Male, aged 25–45 (playing age)
* Must be fluent in Albanian (essential)
* Strong screen presence with the ability to convey intensity and subtle emotion
* Previous acting experience preferred (film/TV/theatre), but not essential

**Project Details:**
* Short film (independent production)
* Genre: Drama / Thriller (dark tone)
* Filming Location: UK
* Shoot Dates: **Last week of April (2-day shoot)**

**Compensation:**
* Paid (low-budget production – details provided upon enquiry)
* Meals and travel expenses covered

**How to Apply:**
Please send the following to [akpe.ododoru@yahoo.co.uk]:
* Headshot
* Showreel (if available)
* Brief introduction (including Albanian language ability)

Shortlisted candidates may be asked to submit a self-tape.

If you want, I can tailor it more toward your **A24-style tone** or even shape the role to fit your story (e.g., taxi driver, antagonist, etc.).

items.text:
Urgent Casting call – Student film

Location: Derby

Unpaid but all expenses paid, costumes provided, food and drink supplied by us.

Dates:

-          27th April

-          28th April

-          30TH April

-          1st May

-          2nd May

1950’s Notorious gang leader Danny Taylor (25) has reached his breaking point and now wishes to find peace through God. He visits church to meet his best friend and sidekick Stanley Campbell (24), upon which he will repent for his sins. Danny never was troubled by his wrongdoings, until he put a bullet through each of his family members heads in return for valuable information about the opposing gang. Now his family haunt him, and without his knowing, Stanley haunts him too. Through his murderous rampage his insanity grew, an insanity that led him to also kill his best friend, only he doesn’t remember and thinks he is still by his side.

CASTING FOR:

-          Danny Taylor: 20 – 35, Notorious Gang leader, headstrong, tough, Calculating and will do anything to come out on top.

-          Stanley Campbell: 20 – 35: Dannys best friend and sidekick, tough, will always let Danny know when he’s in the wrong, sim say the better half of Danny, reasonable but ruthless.

-          Lily Taylor: 18 – 25, Danny’s sister, once best friends with Danny but drifted apart once he took over the gang. Headstrong, Loyal, Empathetic and quick witted and if she had the chance would’ve knocked Danny down a peg or two.

- Evelyn Taylor: 20 - 30, Danny’s wife. Has the purest heart and would’ve killed her closest friend if it meant Danny’s survival. Tough when she needs to be, incredibly intelligent and just wants the world to find peace.

-          Maria Taylor: 50- 60, Danny and Lily’s mother, incredibly kind-hearted and would protect her family to a fault, will take anybody in and never leave anyone without a warm dinner.

-          Francis Taylor: 50-60, Danny and Lilys Father, Tough, Analytical, Insightful yet compassionate. Danny would always go to his father for help in any business he found himself stuck in, his father always managed to get him out of trouble.

If you would like any more information, please reach out, and if you are interested in any of the above roles please contact myself either through Facebook messages or through the following email: feliciterobson@gmail.com

items.summary:
Urgent Casting call – Student film

Location: Derby

Unpaid but all expenses paid, costumes provided, food and drink supplied by us.

Dates:

-          27th April

-          28th April

-          30TH April

-          1st May

-          2nd May

1950’s Notorious gang leader Danny Taylor (25) has reached his breaking point and now wishes to find peace through God. He visits church to meet his best friend and sidekick Stanley Campbell (24), upon which he will repent for his sins. Danny never was troubled by his wrongdoings, until he put a bullet through each of his family members heads in return for valuable information about the opposing gang. Now his family haunt him, and without his knowing, Stanley haunts him too. Through his murderous rampage his insanity grew, an insanity that led him to also kill his best friend, only he doesn’t remember and thinks he is still by his side.

CASTING FOR:

-          Danny Taylor: 20 – 35, Notorious Gang leader, headstrong, tough, Calculating and will do anything to come out on top.

-          Stanley Campbell: 20 – 35: Dannys best friend and sidekick, tough, will always let Danny know when he’s in the wrong, sim say the better half of Danny, reasonable but ruthless.

-          Lily Taylor: 18 – 25, Danny’s sister, once best friends with Danny but drifted apart once he took over the gang. Headstrong, Loyal, Empathetic and quick witted and if she had the chance would’ve knocked Danny down a peg or two.

- Evelyn Taylor: 20 - 30, Danny’s wife. Has the purest heart and would’ve killed her closest friend if it meant Danny’s survival. Tough when she needs to be, incredibly intelligent and just wants the world to find peace.

-          Maria Taylor: 50- 60, Danny and Lily’s mother, incredibly kind-hearted and would protect her family to a fault, will take anybody in and never leave anyone without a warm dinner.

-          Francis Taylor: 50-60, Danny and Lilys Father, Tough, Analytical, Insightful yet compassionate. Danny would always go to his father for help in any business he found himself stuck in, his father always managed to get him out of trouble.

If you would like any more information, please reach out, and if you are interested in any of the above roles please contact myself either through Facebook messages or through the following email: feliciterobson@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING ŁÓDŹ– DOŁĄCZ DO NASZEJ NOWEJ PRODUKCJI! 🎬

Szukamy statystów do nowej, wyjątkowo ciekawej zagranicznej produkcji filmowej! Jeśli masz ochotę zajrzeć za kulisy planu i stać się jego częścią razem z nami — to dla Ciebie idealne miejsce!

📍 Lokalizacja: Łódź (szukamy osób z Łodzi lub bliskich okolic mogących samodzielnie dojeżdżać na plan) 

📅 Terminy zdjęciowe: 
7–16.05 
( kilka lub pojedyncze dni zdjęciowe w tych terminach ) 

🌙 Uwaga: około 90% zdjęć realizowanych będzie w nocy — prosimy o gotowość do pracy w takich godzinach.

Poniżej link do formularza zgłoszeniowego:

https://forms.gle/k1o37T9ueC5c37Dg8

Jeżeli masz problem z wysłaniem formularza, możesz zgłosić się wysyłając maila na adres

 lodz.kamedstudio2026@gmail.com z tytułem ŁÓDŹ

W mailu podaj informacje
1. imię i nazwisko
2. telefon
3. miejsce zamieszkania
4. 2 AKTUALNE zdjęcia (profil i sylwetka ) - zdjęcia, bez nakrycia głowy, na jednolitym tle, bez osób towarzyszących
5. wzrost, rozmiar ubrania, rozmiar buta

Jeśli masz energię, cierpliwość i chcesz przeżyć coś nietypowego — zapraszamy!
🎬 CASTING ŁÓDŹ – JOIN OUR NEW PRODUCTION! 🎬

We are looking for extras for a new, exciting international film production!
If you’d like to get a behind-the-scenes look at a film set and become part of it with us — this is the perfect opportunity for you!

📍 Location: Łódź (we are looking for people based in Łódź or nearby areas who can commute to the set on their own)

📅 Shooting dates:
May 7–16
(several or individual shooting days within this period)

🌙 Note: Around 90% of the shoot will take place at night — please make sure you are available to work during nighttime hours.

Below is the link to the application form:

https://forms.gle/k1o37T9ueC5c37Dg8

If you have trouble submitting the form, you can apply by sending an email to: lodz.kamedstudio2026@gmail.com
Subject line: ŁÓDŹ

Please include the following information in your email:
 1. Full name
 2. Phone number
 3. Place of residence
 4. 2 RECENT photos (profile and full body) — no headwear, plain background, no other people in the frame
 5. Height, clothing size, shoe size

If you’ve got energy, patience, and want to experience something unique — we’d love to have you with us! 🎬

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn i kobiet ( Gliwice/Katowice )**

 

Szukamy skarbu Zakonu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

Jesteśmy grupą pasjonatów składającą się z osób z różnym doświadczeniem filmowym i miejscem zamieszkania. Spotykamy się 1 2 razy w miesiącu na sesjach testowych i video w wybrane niedziele, ustalane 1 2 tygodnie wcześniej. Projekt realizujemy na terenie Gliwic.

** **

**Kolejne nasze spotkanie to 12.04.26 i 19.04.26 ( Niedziela )   godz. 10:30 - 15:00**

 

Nasza Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje chętną osobę do projektu niekomercyjnego mini serialu osadzonego głównie w 1940 roku. Najlepiej jakby takie osoby były  ** z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrza czy Katowice najdalej.**

 

1 – Rycerz Zakonu Templariuszy wiek: 40 – 50 z zarostem, kwestie po francusku

2 – Ojciec głównej bohaterki ‘’Antoni’’ ( Polak ) wiek: 35 – 40, kilka odcinków

3 – Podoficer niemiecki Waffen SS ( Niemiec ) wiek: 25 – 40, bez zarostu

4 – Zastępczyni szefa Ahnenerbe ( Niemka ) wiek: 25 – 30, kilka odcinków

5 – Oficer francuski wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, 1 scena kwestie po francusku

6 – Wujek głównej bohaterki ‘’Leon’’( Polak ) wiek: 40 – 45, kilka odcinków.

7 – Niemiecki żołnierz wiek: 20 – 40 bez zarostu, 2 odcinki kwestie po niemiecku

8 – Niemiecki żandarm wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku, 2 odcinki

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
Dzień dobry,

Chciałbym przedstawić Wam Wiktorię. 14-letnią wokalistkę z Ustronia, która 3 kwietnia 2026 roku zadebiutowała swoim pierwszym utworem wraz z teledyskiem.

Wiktoria to wrażliwa, ambitna i bardzo pracowita młoda artystka. Ukończyła z wyróżnieniem Państwową Szkołę Muzyczną I stopnia w klasie gitary i od lat konsekwentnie rozwija swoją pasję do muzyki.

Jeśli ktoś z Państwa poszukuje młodego głosu do projektu muzycznego, castingu, wydarzenia artystycznego lub innej formy współpracy, będzie nam bardzo miło, jeśli zechce zwrócić uwagę na Wiktorię.

Poniżej zostawiam link do jej debiutanckiego teledysku:
items.previewDescription: "Mała Księżniczka" to debiutancki singiel czternastoletniej Wiktorii Nogowczyk, którego premiera odbyła się 3 kwietnia 2026 roku.Teledysk do utworu był kręco...
items.title: Wiktoria Nogowczyk - Mała Księżniczka (Official Video)
items.summary:
Dzień dobry,

Chciałbym przedstawić Wam Wiktorię. 14-letnią wokalistkę z Ustronia, która 3 kwietnia 2026 roku zadebiutowała swoim pierwszym utworem wraz z teledyskiem.

Wiktoria to wrażliwa, ambitna i bardzo pracowita młoda artystka. Ukończyła z wyróżnieniem Państwową Szkołę Muzyczną I stopnia w klasie gitary i od lat konsekwentnie rozwija swoją pasję do muzyki.

Jeśli ktoś z Państwa poszukuje młodego głosu do projektu muzycznego, castingu, wydarzenia artystycznego lub innej formy współpracy, będzie nam bardzo miło, jeśli zechce zwrócić uwagę na Wiktorię.

Poniżej zostawiam link do jej debiutanckiego teledysku:

items.text:
Ihre Hochzeit – Einzigartig. Elegant. Unvergesslich. ✨

Sie suchen das Besondere für Ihren großen Tag? Jemanden, der Professionalität mit echter Leidenschaft verbindet?

Egal ob Sie eine emotionale Begleitung durch eine Sängerin, einen souveränen Master of Ceremony oder einen mitreißenden Special Act suchen – ich biete Ihnen themenbezogene Eleganz und ein Programm mit Herz.

Warum ich der richtige Partner an Ihrer Seite bin?

Weil ich Ihre Feier aus jeder Perspektive verstehe. Seit über 30 Jahren bin ich als gelernter Eventmanager, Gastronom und Künstler auf kleinen und großen Festen zu Hause. Diese einzigartige Kombination garantiert Ihnen Kompetenz, Empathie und einen unvergesslichen Ablauf.

✉️ Bereit für ein Fest der Extraklasse? 

Kontaktieren Sie mich jetzt für einen Termin zum kostenloses Vorgespräch! Ich freue mich auf Ihre Nachricht.

📧 office-leipzig@web.de
☎️ 034202 154910

#hochzeitssängerin #masterofceremony #hochzeit2026 #eventprofi #specialact #mathiasmariekaiser

items.text:
🎬 Kreative in Dortmund/Bochum gesucht!
Hey zusammen,

ich baue aktuell ein kleines, Content-Team Schauspieler*innen im Raum Dortmund/Bochum auf. Ziel ist es, wöchentlich cinematischen, hochwertigen Content zu produzieren und uns langfristig gemeinsam weiterzuentwickeln.

Ich bin aufstrebender Schauspieler und habe bereits konkrete Ideen sowie eine klare Vision für den Content (cinematisch, relatable, im Filmstil).

Wenn du Leidenschaft für Content Creation hast und Teil von etwas Konsequentem und Ernsthaftem sein möchtest, melde dich gerne bei mir!

items.text:
We are now casting  for our touring  Summer  show Bring Mer Sunshine.

The show is a musical  show featuring songs from around the world La Bamba, Viva Espana, Come Fly With Me,. Summer Holiday ,  Sway , and many more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 25th  -29th May

Playing Dates- 1st June -31st July

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are looking for drivers with cars only .

We are looking for performers on all area of the UK -please include bases when sending details.

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – TRIPLE THREAT PERFORMERS ✨

Fairytale Celebrations UK are seeking triple threat performers of East Asian descent for an exciting high-energy tribute act, with nationwide bookings confirmed for Summer 2026.

We are looking for strong performers who excel in:
🎤 Singing
💃 Dance (commercial / K-pop style preferred)
🎭 Performance & audience interaction

📍 Rehearsals: Manchester-based
🚗 Work: Nationwide bookings
💷 Pay: £50–£90 per hour (dependent on event) + paid travel

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional, high-quality production with a focus on authentic representation and dynamic performance.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot
• Vocal reel
• Dance reel (if available)

📧 info@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk

Join us for a summer of high-energy performances, incredible audiences, and unforgettable experiences ✨

items.text:
Casting Call:  🎬 PAID ON-SCREEN TALENT NEEDED – BIRMINGHAM

We’re looking for confident on-screen talent to feature in short video content for a small solicitors firm.

📍 Filming in and around Birmingham
💷 £50 flat fee (approx. 4 hours)

You’ll be performing a mix of roles — including client-style scenarios, informational content, and some lighter, more engaging videos.

We’re looking for someone who:

Is natural and confident on camera
Can deliver lines clearly and convincingly
Is reliable and easy to work with

🎭 Showreel required

⭐ Potential for ongoing paid work for the right person

📩 Comment below or DM with your showreel + headshot

sharedPost.text:
Stimmtraining für Tanzlehrende mit Stefanie Rummel
Mitreißender 3-stündiger interaktiver Vortrag, der stimmlich viel bewegt hat! 🎤💃
Vielen Dank für die tolle Weiterempfehlung! 🤍 @gassnertorsten

Der Talk „Stimmliche Stärke & Stimmgesundheit für Tanzlehrende“ war ein voller Erfolg! 🔥
Wir haben maßgeschneiderte Lösungen erarbeitet, geübt, entdeckt und herzlich gelacht. Am Ende: Standing Ovations! 🙌
Ein inspirierender Tag, der mich und viele bewegt hat.
Stimme geben ist essenziell! 💃🗣️
Danke INTAKO Kongress für Tanz in Düsseldorf! ✨

translate the last post into English

**Voice Training for Dance Teachers with Stefanie Rummel**  
Thrilling 3-hour interactive lecture that really moved voices! 🎤💃  

Thank you so much for the great recommendation! 🤍 @gassnertorsten  

The talk "Vocal Strength & Voice Health for Dance Teachers" was a huge success! 🔥  

We developed tailored solutions, practiced, discovered, and laughed heartily. In the end: Standing ovations! 🙌  
An inspiring day that moved me and many others.  

Giving voice is essential! 💃🗣️  
Thanks @IntakoDüsseldorf – Dance Congress! ✨

items.text:
**🥁 Calling All Drummers! Be Part of an Exciting Psychological Study 🎵**

Hello! I’m **Arun Barua**, and I am conducting a research study focusing on **drummers and their unique psychological traits**, including aggression, emotional regulation, impulsiveness, and sensation seeking. If you choose to participate, I would be very happy, and your contribution will be extremely helpful for my research.

If you are a drummer 🥁, your participation is especially important, as this study aims to understand how drumming—a powerful and expressive musical activity—relates to emotions and behavior. Non-drummers are also welcome to participate for comparison.

📌 **More details about the study are provided within the Google Form.**

🔒 **Confidentiality Assured:**
All the information you provide will remain strictly confidential and anonymous and will be used only for academic purposes.

📝 **Instructions:**

* There are no right or wrong answers
* Please respond honestly based on your own experiences

🙌 **Voluntary Participation:**
Your participation is completely voluntary, and you may withdraw at any time without any consequences.

✅ **Consent:**
By continuing and submitting the form, you give your informed consent to participate in this study.

Thank you for your valuable time and contribution!
items.previewTitle: Comparative study of Aggression, emotional regulation, impulsiveness & sensation seeking among Drummers and non-Drummers
items.previewDescription: study by Arun Barua, M.Sc. Applied Psychology, Rajabazar Science College, Calcutta University. Supervised by Dr. Ishita Chatterjee Please complete all sections honestly. There are no right or wrong answers. Time required: approximately 15–20 minutes.

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

Short Film Casting Call!
Hey, all! Four Horsemen & Co and Stage Zed Entertainment are producing a new short film in the Metro Detroit area that’ll be shooting at the end of April.

We are casting for four roles! Please see the casting flyer for information. Metro Detroit-based is preferred. Let us know if you have any questions!

items.text:
NCL Dancer Audition in LA
Dancer Auditions in LA on April 23rd for Norwegian Cruise Line

Open Call

Sign in at 9:30AM

Audition at 10:00AM

The Six Compound

4061 Laurel Canyon Blvd. 

Studio City, CA 91604

Please bring a hard copy of your resume and headshot. Be prepared to dance multiple styles. All dancers should bring flat dance shoes/jazz slip-ons as well as sneakers. Female identifying dancers should bring dance heels. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Bezzant

Seeking dancers for two original mainstage productions onboard Norwegian Cruise Line’s newest vessel, the Norwegian LUNA. *ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John* is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second production, *HIKO*, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary dance and movement.

Visit bit.ly/4bFrg1Y for more info!

Non-union. 18 and up only please.

Onboard: $1,000/week ($4,350/month) 

No cruise staff duties. Single cabins.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of dancing and text that says 'e NCL NORWEGIAN NO CRUISE LINE N CRUISES Regent SEVENSEASCAUISES SEVEN ENS CRUISES LOS ANGELES APRIL 23, 2026 DANCERS AUDITION Own the Bold. Build the Trust. Wow the World.'

sharedPost.text:
-Du singst gerne ?
-Du hast Lust, es besser zu können?
-Du möchtest in einen Chor, um gemeinsam mit anderen zu musizieren, traust es Dir aber bislang nicht zu?
-Du hast andere Beweggründe, Dich intensiver mit deiner Stimme zu befassen?

Dann melde Dich!

Ich zeige Dir, wie man eine solide Atem-/Stimmtechnik erarbeitet, wie Du beim Sprechen und Singen mehr Selbstvertrauen gewinnst und gebe Dir peu à peu das Grundwerkzeug an die Hand, Dich stimmlich wohler zu fühlen.

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

Eure/ Ihre
Annette Kuhn

📍 **Drehort:** Heidelberg (Start: Langer Anger 38 – Firmensitz IMMO 4.0 GmbH)
🗓️ **Datum:** Freitag, 27.03.
⏱️ **Dauer:** max. 3 Stunden

🎯 Projekt

Für einen UGC-Videodreh (20 Reels à 40–60 Sekunden) suchen wir einen passenden Schauspieler.
Die Texte werden **vorgesprochen (Teleprompter vorhanden)** – kein Auswendiglernen notwendig.

Gedreht wird an **1–2 Immobilien in Heidelberg** (gemeinsame Anfahrt vom Büro).

👤 **Gesuchtes Profil**
* Mann, **30–40 Jahre**
* Gepflegtes, **seriöses Erscheinungsbild**
* Typ: **junger, gehobener Geschäftsmann**
* Stil: **Business / Business Casual**
* Natürliches, authentisches Auftreten vor der Kamera
* Deutschsprachig (akzentfrei)

💸 **Vergütung**
* **500 € pauschal**
* **inkl. aller Nebenkosten & MwSt.**

📩 **Bewerbung**

Bitte **ausschließlich per WhatsApp** an unseren Videografen:

**Luca Falk, Nummer: 01792014052**

👉 Gewünscht:
* kurzes **Bewerbungsvideo**
* aktuelle **Bilder**

Wir freuen uns auf passende Bewerbungen! 🚀

items.text:
For my bachelor graduation film at Salzburg University of Applied Sciences (FH Salzburg), I am looking for the second lead actor for the short film “Head Over Heels”.
Head Over Heels is a stylized 80s slasher short film about a complicated father-son relationship, combining classic horror with psychological tension.
CHUCK
Gender: Male
Playing age: 14–18
Role: Second lead
Language: English (American accent required)
Shooting days: Multiple days (major role)
Description
Chuck is Charles’ son and the unwilling partner in his father’s magic shows and petty thefts. Intelligent, cynical, and emotionally exhausted by their life.
He loves his father but is slowly losing respect for him. Chuck sees reality more clearly than Charles: their life is unstable, dangerous, and offers little future.
His frustration often appears as sarcasm and emotional distance. Beneath that exterior, however, is a vulnerable teenager who simply longs for stability and a normal life.
The role requires a strong emotional range, from dry irony to intense desperation.

Synopsis
Charles and his son Chuck make a living through a combination of magic shows and petty theft. When they accept an invitation to perform at a birthday party, the job initially seems harmless. However, the hosts begin to behave strangely. Soon they discover that the seemingly friendly postman they met earlier has a deeply disturbed idea of family and has chosen Charles to become his new father. What started as a simple gig turns into a deadly game.

Project Information
Title: Head Over Heels
Genre: 80s Slasher Horror
Format: Short Film / Bachelor Graduation Film
Location: Ebreichsdorf, Austria
Shooting Period: June 15 – June 21, 2026
Producer: Florian Peter
Director: Vanessa Brshanca
Language: The film will be performed in English. All actors must be fluent in English and able to perform with a convincing American accent.

items.text:
Auditions for Revolutionary War-era outdoor theatre at Catoctin Furnace
Auditions: Iron Will at Catoctin Furnace Theatre 

Outdoor, site-specific theatre at Catoctin Furnace, Thurmont, Maryland.

Producer/Director: Reiner Prochaska for the Catoctin Furnace Historical Society

Audition Date(s): ASAP via Zoom

Rehearsal Dates:Sat. 5/2-Sat. 5/9: onsite rehearsals

Mon. 5/11 Tech 

Tues. 5/12 Dress Rehearsal 

Wed. 5/13 Final Dress Rehearsal 

Performance Dates:

Th.  5/14 7:00pm 

Fri. 5/15 7:00pm 

Sat. 5/16 7:00pm 

Sun. 5/17 5:00pm

Non-Union; all roles are paid; see details below.

Audition Details:To schedule an audition, actors interested in principal roles (including understudies), email Reiner Prochaska at livinghistory@catoctinfurnace.org and include a recent headshot/selfie and your acting résumé.

Anyone interested in playing an ironworker as a background performer, email Reiner Prochaska at livinghistory@catoctinfurnace.org and include a recent selfie.Principal Roles:

For all principal roles, we are looking for experienced actors who are comfortable performing in outdoor environments. Stipends for principal roles are $350.00 

General David Poe Sr. (white male, early 30s to late 40s, Irish accent)—the Assistant Deputy Quartermaster General of the Army of the United States in Baltimore, he travels to Catoctin Furnace to oversee the final shipment of shells in October of 1780. Strong, experienced actor who can master an Irish accent.

Jeremiah Bowles (white male late 20s to late 40s)— Jeremiah is the founder at Catoctin Furnace. Although he comes from a family loyal to the British Crown, he is now involved in supporting the Patriot cause. When he is blackmailed by a Loyalist saboteur, Jeremiah must betray the man who entrusted him with a position of leadership at the furnace. Strong, experienced actor. African/

African-American Ironworkers/Understudies (male and female identifying 18-60s)—an important aspect of our story is that in 1780 the furnace relied heavily on industrial slave labor. Understudies for principal roles should have some acting experience. General Ironworkers need not have significant acting experience.

Storyline: In October of 1780, European immigrants and African slaves at Catoctin Furnace, Maryland, are struggling to produce the final shipment of shells that will, ultimately, be fired at the decisive Battle of Yorktown when word reaches the community that Pennsylvania will abolish slavery. A teenaged slave decides to run away while a Loyalist spy blackmails the furnace founder into committing sabotage to prevent the successful completion of the shells. Audiences will immerse themselves into the lives of both historical and fictional characters, whose stories unfold against the backdrop of Catoctin Furnace’s rich Revolutionary War era history.

items.text:
ONE MONTH FREE ACCESS TO LINUS, A SCENE PARTNER APP
Learn lines, self-tape, and rehearse scenes when you’re preparing alone.

Hi, I’m Callan 👋🏽

My mate Alfred and I are actors and NIDA grads from Australia, and we built Linus on iOS, Android, and Web to support actors preparing alone.

It’s actor-owned, independently built, and uses licensed voices from real voice actors who get paid every time they’re used.

We’ve been awarded a grant to give 20,000 actors **free access to Linus Pro for the month of May.**

Create a free account by **May 1** to get your free month of Linus Pro: [https://www.getlinus.app/](https://www.getlinus.app/)

Please share this with any actors who might benefit.

Linus can speak and respond in 38 different languages. Happy to answer any questions below.

***Note to admins: If I’ve breached any group rules, please feel free to reach out. I’m not looking to overstep, just trying to make the most of this grant we’ve been awarded.***

Hello everyone!
Whitehardt is hosting virtual auditions on Thursday, April 9th, 2026 for new faces in their client commercials. We are looking for Black, White, and Hispanic actors, male or female, and native Spanish speakers are welcomed! We aim to hire actors between the ages of 28-60 years old. We have switched back to Zoom, so it will be much more organized than last time. 

Please reach out to me should you like to book a Zoom audition. This production company is in Tennessee. Thanks!

items.text:
**Looking for 1st Assistant Director (1st AD) – Short Film "Silent Resilience"**

Hi everyone! I’m currently looking for an **experienced 1st AD** to join our upcoming narrative short film.

This is a **festival-driven project** focusing on social realism, with plans for international festival submissions (including Berlinale).

📍 **Location:** Toronto (North York Civic Centre + Downtown)
📅 **Shoot Dates:** April 18–20, 2026

🔹 About the Film

"Silent Resilience" tells the story of a Chinese immigrant woman fighting for unpaid wages in a system that refuses to respond.
The film explores themes of **labour injustice, silence, and dignity**, with a grounded, realistic visual style.

🔹 What We’re Looking For

• Prior experience as a **1st AD on narrative films (shorts or features)**
• Strong understanding of on-set workflow, scheduling & crew coordination
• Comfortable working in a **fast-paced, low-budget indie environment**
• Strong communication skills (English required, Mandarin is a plus)
• Experience with **festival-level or professional sets preferred**

🔹 Responsibilities

• Run the set and maintain shooting schedule
• Coordinate between director, DP, cast & crew
• Assist with script breakdown & call sheets
• Manage background actors (large protest scene)

🔹 Compensation

• Paid (low-budget indie rate, based on experience)
• IMDb credit
• Opportunity to collaborate on a **festival-level project**

📩 **To apply, please DM me or email:**
**zoeyfilm77@gmail.com**

Please include:
• Your experience / resume
• Previous work (if available)

🙏 Feel free to share or tag someone who might be a good fit. Thank you!

items.text:
Seattle WA
FlightTime Productions proudly presents auditions for the upcoming Short Film:

                     Amelia, Once More

We are seeking cast members of all kinds: adult men, women and children. Must be 16+ to audition for the production. 

Non-Union Actors Only!

Auditions are by appointment only:

Friday, April 3rd, 2026

12PM, 1PM, 2PM, 3PM & 4PM

To sign up for a free audition appointment, please email an updated copy of your headshot and acting resume to ameliastageplay@gmail.com. Please also list two available audition times you are available to audition at.

Auditions will be held at:

Seattle Public Library- Ballard Branch

5614 22nd Ave. N.W. 

Seattle, WA 98107

*This event is NOT hosted, sponsored, or endorsed by The Seattle Public Library*

For auditions, please prepare a 1-minute monologue of your choice. Preferably a comedic or dramatic monologue that can show your talent range. Please note, improvisation skills are definitely important for the production. You will also be acting out parts from the short film with other actors for the audition process.

If cast, there will be rehearsal schedule meeting to discuss availability as well as the show schedule. A stipend will be paid out to all actors involved in the film.

Filming will begin in July 2026 for a 3-6 week timeframe.

📍 PLYMOUTH

items.text:
Hi everyone!
My name is Ramin. I’m Uk-based  Director & Cinematographer.

Here’s a collection of my works called “Fragments of Light”.

If you Looking for Director & Videographer,a music video or cinematic content or filmmaking ?

I Working with:

– Artists

– Musicians

– Creators

– Filmmakers

_ Brands 

Let’s bring the visions to life.

DM me to start 🎥

items.text:
🔥⚡ VENDOR FLASH SALE — LIMITED TIME! ⚡🔥

🤠 The GA Country Summer Festival 2026 is calling ALL vendors — and for a limited time, you can lock in your booth for just $75.

📅 Sunday, May 10th, 2026  
📍 The Colonnade • Ringgold, GA  
🕛 Vendor Hours: 12PM–9PM  

That’s a full day to sell, connect, and maximize your visibility in a high-energy festival atmosphere built around music, community, and family fun.

🎤 Featuring a celebrity guest performance by Tae Lewis from The Voice

We are open to all vendor categories, including:  
✅ Food Vendors  
✅ Retail & Crafts  
✅ Products, Services & More  

💥 This is more than a vendor space — it’s an opportunity to put your business in front of a live crowd, gain new customers, and be part of something BIG.

⏰ Limited spots available — first come, first served. Once they’re gone, they’re gone.

👇 3 EASY WAYS TO REGISTER 👇  

📲 Call or Text: 770-755-3987  
👉 Ask for Karah or Chad VanHoose  

📱 Scan the QR Code on the flyer  

🔗 Register online:  
https://www.eventeny.com/events/ga-country-summer-festival-23734/

🎶 Good music. Great vibes. YOUR booth. Let’s make it happen.

#GACountrySummerFestival #VendorFlashSale #Ringgold #Georgia #CountryFestival #VendorOpportunity #SmallBusiness #FoodVendor #CraftVendor #PopUpShop #SupportLocal #XtremeDreamsFoundation

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – TRIPLE THREAT PERFORMERS ✨

Fairytale Celebrations UK are seeking triple threat performers of East Asian descent for an exciting high-energy tribute act, with nationwide bookings confirmed for Summer 2026.

We are looking for strong performers who excel in:
🎤 Singing
💃 Dance (commercial / K-pop style preferred)
🎭 Performance & audience interaction

📍 Rehearsals: Manchester-based
🚗 Work: Nationwide bookings
💷 Pay: £50–£90 per hour (dependent on event) + paid travel

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional, high-quality production with a focus on authentic representation and dynamic performance.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot
• Vocal reel
• Dance reel (if available)

📧 info@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk

Join us for a summer of high-energy performances, incredible audiences, and unforgettable experiences ✨

items.text:
Spürst du das Kribbeln? Genau das ist dein Moment.  

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 steht in den Startlöchern und schon jetzt zeigt sich: Diese Staffel wird größer, wilder und spannender als je zuvor! 🚀  

Denn viele starke Talente haben sich bereits beworben… und trotzdem fehlt noch DU!  

💥 Stell dir vor:  
Licht an. Musik startet. Das Publikum schaut nur auf dich.  

Und du zeigst endlich, was in dir steckt.  

🎤 Ganz egal, was dein Talent ist:  
Ob du singst, tanzt, performst, Menschen zum Lachen bringst oder etwas komplett Einzigartiges kannst diese Bühne gehört dir!  

🌟 Was dich erwartet:  
• Eine echte Bühne mit Live-Publikum  
• Gänsehaut-Momente & pure Emotion  
• Eine Show voller Energie und Überraschungen  
• Die Chance, entdeckt zu werden  

⚡ Und das Beste:  
Schon jetzt ist klar – die Konkurrenz ist stark, die Acts sind vielfältig und das Niveau steigt.  

👉 Es wird ein Wettbewerb, den man nicht verpassen darf!  

🚀 Jetzt liegt es an dir:  
Willst du nur zuschauen… oder selbst auf der Bühne stehen?  

📅 Jury Castings: Mai, Juni & Juli 2026  

📝 Bewirb dich jetzt:  
👉 https://electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html  

🔥 Trau dich. Zeig dein Talent. Verändere deinen Moment.  

#evctalentcastingshow #casting2026 #jetztbewerben #talentshow #kleve #showtime #traudich

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says "EVC TALENT CASTING SHOW 2026 jetzt bewerben für die neue Staffel Wir sucheń Musiker, Tänzer, Artisten, Comedians oder begeistere uns mit mit deinem oder eurem Talent!"

🎙️ Du suchst eine Stimme für deine Geschichte?  

Ich bringe Geschichten zum Leben – egal ob Kurzstory, Hörspiel oder Social Media Content.  
Auch im Bereich Synchronsprechen bin ich offen für spannende Projekte.  

Ich freue mich über Anfragen und neue Aufträge! ✨

items.text:
✨ Zapraszamy na magiczny wieczór telewizyjny! ✨
W każdy piątek wyjątkowe nagranie programu „Sekielski wieczorową porą” – miejsca, gdzie rozmawia się o ważnych sprawach społecznych w niezwykłej atmosferze.

Zapraszamy razem z rodzinami, znajomymi! Możecie się zgłosić większą paczką 🥰😍☺️

CO I JAK:

NAJBLIŻSZE NAGRANIE:

🔷Piątek 10.04

🕗 Zbiórka: 19:30

🎬 Nagranie: do ok. 23:00

💸Wynagrodzenie: 70 zł

(płatne gotówką po nagraniu)

💎KOLEJNE DATY: 10.04, 17.04, 24.04

ZAPISZ SIĘ:

📩 Zgłoszenia: ludzie@unagimedia.pl

✉ Tytuł wiadomości: S10 lub S17 lub S24

W treści podaj:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• numer telefonu

• aktualne zdjęcie

lub 

zgłoś się przez formularz:

https://forms.gle/q5SivhrTzzRXGNSf7

Do zobaczenia na planie!

**DOMÓWKA SENIORÓW  ****#płatne**** **

Cześć! Do sesji promocyjnej w klimacie imprezy na działce szukam energicznych i oryginalnych seniorów.

📍Zdjęcia 18/19.04 (sobota lub niedziela) - Warszawa/okolice

Poszukiwane role (60+):
1. Seniorka narratorka - stawka 450 zł
2. Seniorzy i seniorki epizodyści - stawka 250 zł
3. Seniorzy i seniorki statyści - stawka 150 zł

Zainteresowanych proszę o zgłoszenia w wiadomościach prywatnych z:
* aktualnymi zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki
* wizytówką
* demo/scenkę mówioną
* wiekiem
* wzrostem i wymiarami

items.title: **DOMÓWKA SENIORÓW  ****#płatne**** **

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję odtwórców do następujacych ról:

1. Klaudia Marchlewska (23) – młoda matka, dwa lata po ślubie z Mikołajem. Marzy o dużej rodzinie, ale jest bardzo zmęczona po urodzeniu pierwszego dziecka, tęskni za czasem spędzonym z Mikołajem. Ładna, ale widocznie przemęczona. Bardzo uczuciowa, źle znosi stres.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

2. Mikołaj Marchlewski (27) – młody ojciec, zakochany w córce i żonie. Fajny, uczuciowy facet. Trochę narwany, ale z sercem na dłoni. Wysoki, wysportowany. Chętnie trochę dłuższe włosy. 

Data: 22., 23. i 24. kwietnia
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

3. Dorota (32) – przemęczona, nadużywająca alkoholu matka trójki dzieci. Pogubiona, nie zna umiaru. Kocha dzieci, ale przez alkohol i złe wzorce ze swojego dzieciństwa, nie potrafi się nimi odpowiednio zająć.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 100 zł netto za całość

4. Emil (36) – mąż Doroty. Lubi wygodne życie, dzieci mu trochę przeszkadzają, choć je kocha. Ma bardzo luźne podejście, nic go nie martwi, niczym się nie przejmuje. Z brzuszkiem – lubi zjeść i popić.

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

5. Gangus (35-45) – człowiek Bizona. Głośny, ordynarny. Zbyt pewny siebie, przestaje być czujny. Nabity, wysoki. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 500 zł netto

6. Suchy (26) – młody, zagubiony. Nie skończył szkoły i nie mógł znaleźć pracy, dlatego wpakował się w szemrane interesy. Nie zdaje sobie sprawy, kim jest Bizon i czym tak naprawdę się zajmuje. Kocha dzieci swojej siostry, nie mógłby porwać żadnego dzieciaka. Przyjemny w odbiorze, przysadzisty, ogolony na łyso. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

7. Bizon (42) – szef szajki. Niebezpieczny, choć niepozorny. Dawniej prawie poszedł siedzieć za handel ludźmi, czuje się bezkarny, nikt nie może udowodnić mu winy. Skupiony na sobie i swoim biznesie, z nastawieniem po trupach do celu. Szczupły i wysoki.

Data: 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość

8. Kostek (35-40) – gangus, bliski współpracownik Bizona. Nie lubi go, ale go szanuje – docenia „ludzi sukcesu”, kasę zawsze chętnie przyjmie. Przysadzisty. 

Data: 22. i 23. kwietnia
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

topComments.text: Przy stawce Doroty chyba wkradł się błąd a raczej jest za mało o jedno zero.

items.text:
Cremet bøf- og babybroccoli-alfredo-spaghetti
Denne cremede bøf- og babybroccoli-alfredo-spaghetti er en fyldig og lækker stegepandepasta, der kombinerer møre bøfbidder med frisk babybroccoli og perfekt tilberedt spaghetti, alt sammen dækket af en lækker hvidløgs- og parmesan-flødesauce 
𝙍𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙞𝙣 𝙁𝙞𝙧𝙨𝙩 𝘾.𝙤.𝙢.𝙢.𝙚.𝙣.𝙩 𝘾.𝙤.𝙢.𝙚.𝙣.𝙩 𝒬

𝙍𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙞𝙣 𝙁𝙞𝙧𝙨𝙩 𝘾.𝙤.𝙢.𝙢.𝙚.𝙣.𝙩 𝘾.𝙤.𝙢.𝙚.𝙣.𝙩 𝒬

items.text:
JEG HAR ALDRIG SET EN NEMMERE METODE! Resultatet forbløffede mig! EN LÆKKER OPSKRIFT PÅ KAGE
Ingredienser:
250 ml lunken mælk
1/4 kop sukker
1 spsk (7 g) tørgær
1 æg
1 tsk salt
550-650 g mel
80 g (1/3 kop) smør
80 g (1/2 kop) smør
1 æggeblomme + 1 spsk mælk
Valmuefrø
Jeg skal sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter... Tak.
Opskrift i toppen R.E.P.L.Y.

items.text:
THE MEETING
A gripping and imaginative drama that stages a fictional encounter between two of the most influential leaders of the Civil Rights Movement: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X. Set in a Harlem hotel room in 1965, the play brings these towering figures together for an intense, intimate, and deeply human conversation about justice, strategy, and the future of Black America.April 17th to May 3rd

items.text:
The time has finally come everyone! As of 3-10-2026 'Gloria' (a feature film based on a real couple from El Paso, Texas in the 1930's) is available to rent or buy on Amazon Prime. This film was completely shot in El Paso, Texas.  Also available for DVD purchase on Amazon. 🎥🙂
Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. If you would like to be part of our social media campaign feel free to send a direct message to our Gloria Instagram page viewing the film along with the names of those you'd like us to tag. You'll then see your picture or video pop up on our The Gloria Movie     Facebook page and Gloria Instagram page. 😊🎬 We have arrived to share with the public. Thank you Amazon Prime! 🙏🎬🎉🙌�

Gloria Instagram link below: 

https://www.instagram.com/thegloriamovie?igsh=dm5rYTVvZ3B6ZjBi

Amazon (Buy/Rent):

https://www.amazon.com/gp/video/detail/B0GL251YNY/

Amazon DVD:

https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GNW4X3X2/ref=atv_dp_oth_format_dvd_0

items.text:
Pacific Producers Group & Vancouver Virtual Productions are casting for a 30-second and 15-second TV commercial to be filmed on April 16th in Coquitlam.

**3-4 Year Old Girl (female, 3-5 years old, Caucasian)**
* Positive, energetic, excitable, a winning smile
* Her character is wearing a full bathing suit, wrapped up in a towel over top, and is putting one foot in and out of a small kid-sized inflatable pool in the summer.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* Compensation: 1x30-sec ad - $750, agency fee included.
* Rights & Terms: a complete buyout for all media in perpetuity
* This is a non-union shoot (no royalties/residuals) and shooting will require a day of the talent’s time – we estimate a 2 to 4 hour day for talent
* Character has no dialogue
* We will be focused on naturalness, energy, and connection to other characters (mom)
* Lunch/food will be provided
* Filming will be indoors, in a studio
* The TV ad is for an outdoor living product, and the script is family-oriented
* Talent will provide their own basic wardrobe, but some character-specific wardrobe items may be supplied by production
* A wardrobe allowance will be added for any personal items used ($25 for basic wardrobe outfit, plus $5 for each additional item)

**AUDITION MATERIAL**

If interested, please email a headshot and resume to duramarket@duradek.com .

You’re also welcome to submit any web links to an online reel, demo, or portfolio of past work. However, we are specifically seeking audition material; these can be self-filmed on a phone or iPhone – with the following requested audition material:

We’d love to see this young actress in playful situations – skipping

rope or playing hopscotch or balancing on one leg, enjoying themselves and laughing.

sharedPost.text:
Casting for "The Suit I Buried Her In", a feature film by @the8tharchiveprod

🎭Looking for mains/supporting/feature roles. After the death of his girlfriend, a Chinese-Canadian college student must confront his family's cultural shame and thr painful journey of learning to accept himself before anyone else. Email your CV, portfolio, or self-tape at tsibhi.2026@gmail.com before APRIL 12TH.

Find us on instagram @the8tharchiveprod

#vancouvercasting #vancouverfilm #castingcall #actors #casting #the8tharchive #tsibhi #thesuitiburiedherin #vancouveractors

items.text:
CASTING CALL! Did an AI Chatbot Negatively Impact Your Life?
I’m a producer working with Muse, a leading television production company currently developing a premium documentary film for a major network.

We’re seeking individuals (18+) based in the U.S. or Canada who are open to sharing their personal experiences with AI chatbots as part of the upcoming documentary. **Have AI chatbots had a negative impact on your life, relationships, mental health, or career?** Have you ever felt misled, overly validated, or even disconnected from reality through interactions with them? **Did you experience paranormal activity through a chatbot?**

If so, please get in touch to learn more! (for those who have applied already, you are still being considered, thanks!). Please reach out via email to **casting@muse.ca** with a brief description of your experience. 

Note: ***This casting call is NOT permitted to be shared on external sites without prior consent.***

topComments.text: I have a wild story there, willing to share
Hello I shot you a an email of a story of me an autistic women’s experience

items.text:
🐣🌸 Frohe Ostern von den FMM Studios München! 🌸🐣  

Wir wünschen all unseren Kunden – und allen, die es noch werden möchten – entspannte Feiertage, kreative Inspiration und ganz viel gute Musik! 🎶✨  

Die FMM Studios München stehen für professionelle:  
🎧 Musikproduktion  
🎚️ Mixing & Mastering  
🎬 Postproduktion (Film & Audio)  

Und für alle, die selbst durchstarten wollen:  
🎹 Coaching & Kurse – online oder 1:1 direkt bei uns im Studio  

Egal ob du deinen nächsten Song produzieren willst, deinen Mix auf ein neues Level bringen möchtest oder in die Welt der Audioproduktion eintauchen willst – wir sind für dich da.  

👉 Mehr Infos: www.fmm-studios.de  

Genießt die Feiertage und bleibt kreativ! 🐰🎶  
Euer FMM Studios Team

items.text:
Hello! 
I’m a LA based actor looking for my next screen role! 🎬 
I’m currently working on 2 indie films, so I’m available for new projects starting early May!

Comfortable with drama, action, and comedy — and I’m a native Japanese speaker, fluent in English, so I can bring something a little different to your project!

Would love to collaborate with you — feel free to DM me with your project details!

You can also check my social medias too!🌟
Insta: @414pics
TikTok: @414pics

Thank you!

items.text:
Unsere KRÖNUM-Dinnershow begeistert in diesem Jahr mit einem besonders atmosphärischen und einzigartigen Programm. 

Für ausgewählte Termine suchen wir eine vielseitige Künstlerin als Zweitbesetzung, die Gesang mit Tanz oder Akrobatik verbindet.

Gesucht wird eine Besetzung für folgende Termine:
17. & 18. April
08. & 09. Mai
04. & 05. Juni
07., 08. & 09. Juni
12. & 13. Juni

Bei Interesse freuen wir uns über eine E-Mail mit Referenzmaterial an **veranstaltung@turisede.de**.

Geheime Welt von Turisede
Kulturinsel Einsiedel 1
02829 Neißeaue OT Zentendorf

items.text:
Casting Call "Frank"
Für unseren zweiten No-Budget-Kurzfilm "Cry Sam" suchen wir eine passende Besetzung für die Rolle des "Frank". 

männliche Rolle 

Spielalter: 35 bis 40 Jahre 

Drehzeitraum: 05. bis 09. Oktober 

Drehort: Neckar-Odenwald 

Weitere Infos zum Film & der Rolle könnt ihr der Outline entnehmen. (Das Bild in der Outline dient lediglich der Illustration und ist nicht bindend oder unsere Erwartung.)

Richtet eure Bewerbung mit Referenzen bitte an:

katlenafilms@gmail.com

Wir freuen uns auf euch :)

Lena & Ann-Katrin 

Katlenafilms

sharedPost.text:
‼️ŚLĄSK: Katowice i okolice‼️   
🔥Zapraszamy na plan: 13.04 – 16.04!🔥 

💥KAWIOR (40-55 lat)
Data: 13.04 / poniedziałek - 1 efektowna scena
Stawka: 300 zł 
/Rola mówiona, mile widziana „łysa glaca” oraz kolczyki i tatuaże/

💥WYWIADOWCA (30-55 lat)
Data: 13.04 / poniedziałek - 1 efektowna scena
Stawka: 200 zł 
/potrzebnych kilka osób/

💥UCZENNICA LICEUM (18-20 lat)
Data: 14.04 / wtorek – 2 sceny
Stawka: 200 zł 
/potrzebnych kilka osób/

💥GWIDON (30-45 lat)
Data: 16.04 / czwartek 
Stawka: 300 zł 
/dobrze zbudowany + prawo jazdy warunek konieczny! /

💥GANGUS (25-35 lat)
Data: 16.04 / czwartek – 2 sceny
Stawka: 200 zł 
/potrzebnych kilka osób/

💥KELNERKA (25-35 lat) 
Data: 16.04 / poniedziałek - 1 scena
Stawka: 200 zł 
/mile widziana brunetka/

💥NIUNIA (20-26 lat)
Data: 13.04 / poniedziałek - 1 scena
Stawka: 300 zł 
/Rola mówiona, poszukiwana blondynka/

💲Stawki netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie 💲  
➡️GRAMY: Katowice i okolice  

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com
W tytule prosimy wpisać nazwę roli do której Państwo się zgłaszają.

✅ Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.
Serdecznie zapraszamy  

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do danej roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" i lokacja są podawane dzień wcześniej. (Wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).

PS: Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

Do zobaczenia na planie!!!

items.text:
I’m Richard Brown, the President of Scenic View Pictures.  I’ve been in the industry for 17 years and have produced, written and directed award winning screenplays and films.  My company specializes in film budgeting, script breakdowns, permitting and union guidelines.  

Our script breakdown service involves your screenplay being broken down into lists of props, wardrobe, characters and locations.

An estimated shooting schedule and budget is then drafted based on current market research into the following costs:  acting/crew unions, permits, catering, craft services, insurance, props, lodging, travel reimbursement, location fees, post production, venue fees, etc.

Here are the costs associated with each script length:

- Short Script Breakdown and Budget Package - Script under 30 pages.  $30/hour with six hour minimum charge.

- Mid Length Script Breakdown and Budget Package - Script between 30 to 50 pages.  $40/hour with ten hour minimum charge.

- Feature Length Script Breakdown and Budget Package - Script over 50 pages.  $50/hour with sixteen hour minimum charge.

If you are interested in any of these services and want to schedule an engagement call, please email at richardbrown.filmmaker@gmail.com.

I look forward to helping you bring your film to life.

items.text:
Casting Call – San Diego (Paid Shoot)
We’re casting for a home service business commercial shooting in San Diego on the 18th and 19th.

Looking for:

 • Men and women

 • Ages 30–60+

 • Must be natural and comfortable on camera

This is not for actors who feel scripted or stiff — we need real, relatable people who can speak and behave naturally on camera.

To apply:

Text 858-753-5927 with:

 • A short video of you on camera (talking naturally)

 • Any past work or reel (if you have it)

 • Your name + age

If you’re not comfortable being yourself on camera, please don’t apply.

items.text:
# **The industry isn't dying, it’s just changing.**

The 'old way' of finding work in film and creative media is fading, and it’s leaving a lot of talented people in the dark. It’s hard to have an **entrepreneurial mindset** when you were trained to follow a traditional path, but right now,*** collaboration is our greatest currency.***

I started a community specifically to support individuals who still want to make a career out of their creative skills. It’s time to find the people you **actually want to work with** and create your own opportunities. I run a space for creators who are shifting from 'job seekers' to '**opportunity makers'.**

If you’re willing to put in the work but just need the right community to back you up,** drop a comment. **Let’s stop waiting on the studios.

items.text:
📣 CASTING – WARSZAWA
Cześć Warszawo! 🎬

Kochani, szukam statystów do spotu modowego 👇

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 11–14.04

👤 Kogo szukamy:

• osoby w wieku 20–40 lat

• ładne, wysokie, o ciekawym wyglądzie

⸻

🎥 PLAN ZDJĘCIOWY:

11.04 – SUMMER STYLES

🏝️ impreza nad basenem (bez bikini)

🚐 transport z Warszawy

12.04 – SNEAKERS + CASUAL UNISEX

🚶‍♀️ przechodnie na ulicy

13.04 – HANDBAGS + SPRING/SUMMER DRESSES

🎉 goście na przyjęciu

14.04 – SPORT

🌳 przechodnie w parku

⸻

💰 Stawka: 140 zł / dzień (przelew)

📩 Zgłoszenia: plan@filmakacja.pl

📌 Tytuł maila: spot 11-14

W mailu proszę zamieścić- imię, nazwisko, wiek tel, wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki oraz wymiary. 

⚠️ Szukam osób zdecydowanych – zgłoszenia od razu wysyłam do produkcji

📞 Odezwę się do wybranych osób do piątku do końca dnia

⸻

Marta Filmakcja 😀🎬

Kolejny ciekawy projekt współczesny - SZUKAMY STATYSTÓW I EPIZODYSTÓW W** BIELSKO- BIAŁEJ I OKOLICACH!**

📅 Zdjęcia: **26, 27 oraz 28 MAJA 2026!**

🎥 Gatunek: serial współczesny

Szukamy osób o różnym wyglądzie i pochodzeniu – zarówno europejskim, jak i etnicznym.

items.text:
🌷 It's almost a new term already, so we thought we'd introduce ourselves as we recently joined this group! 👋🏼

We're Josh & Aimee, a husband and wife team who both happened to be home educated growing up!
We now run Swan Tutoring - engaging online classes for home educating families! We have a lovely small team of wonderful teachers, and we offer the following subjects...

English 📚 Maths 🧮 Science 🧬 History 🏛️ Geography 🌎 World Explorers ✈️  Social Studies 🪭 Psychology 🧠 Health & Nutrition 🍎 Life Skills 🌱 Spanish 🇪🇸 French 🇫🇷 British Sign Language 🤟 Piano 🎹 Art 🎨 Phonics 🔤 Reception Class 👧🏽 GCSE classes 🎓

We have spaces available for the upcoming term, so let us know if you'd like more information! 😊

items.previewTitle:
Recorded a conversation with Indie Film Sucks out of St. Louis.

A good, honest talk with Chris Grega about the work, the process, and the long road of getting a film out there.

We got into Blind Blood, which continues to travel, recently picking up Best Drama at the Tokyo Film and Screenplay Awards in Japan, the first time the film’s reached that part of the world.

Chris had also reviewed the film ahead of the conversation, if you’re curious:
https://www.indiefilmsucks.com/post/review-blind-blood

Episode coming soon.

#BlindBlood #IndieFilm #IndependentFilm #Filmmaking #IndieFilmmaker 

88mm Productions

Hope to see you soon.

🚨 BIG NEWS ALERT! 🚨  
🌟 This is YOUR chance to be part of something extraordinary! 🌟  

I’ve officially joined an inspiring new project under the Forever Entertainment family, and let me tell you—it’s time for BIG change. In a world that’s losing its sense of connection, this American production is here to bring people together to create something meaningful.  

Though I’m new to Forever Entertainment, I’ve never been more convinced of a project’s potential. This is more than just entertainment; it’s a movement. We’re collaborating, creating, and giving people (maybe YOU) the chance to get their names in shining lights. It’s your time to step closer to the spotlight and be part of something much bigger.  

But guess what? Projects like this succeed with the power of US—of YOU. Together, we can make magic happen. Join this unique journey and help us crowdfund a production that the world truly needs right now. Let’s build something unforgettable.  

✨ Ready to leave your mark? Will you take the leap? Drop a 🔥 if you’re with me, and head to the link in bio NOW to get involved! Opportunities like this don’t wait. Let’s shine together.

#BeTheChange

#FilmCommunity

#YourNameInLights

items.text:
(PAID) CASTING CALL – CATWOMAN FANMADE SHORT FILM (CASTING INTERNATIONALLY TO FILM IN NYC)

An upcoming independent student short film casting for the lead role of Catwoman!! Using a special loan granted and sponsored by our film school.

Producer/Director: Maddi Egan (unfortunately our previous director has had to step away due to family commitments)

Role: Catwoman

Gender: Female

Age Range: 18–25

Ethnicity: Open to all backgrounds

Location: New York City, United States, exact location unknown. As we are casting internationally, flights and hotel accommodation will be covered. If visa coverage / sponsorship is needed, we can sort upon further discussion depending on customs/national law requirements etc

This is a paid role. Transport and catering will be fully covered for all selected talent. 

Pay will be $4,000 USD for 20 hours of filming over two days ($200 an hour), which will be written in a contract (which will also detail accommodations, flights, etc) approved by our professor and given to whoever is successful in the role

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is not essential.

If you believe you fit this description, please email Eganmaddi1@gmail.com with your CV, Headshot and Showreel. If you don’t have any of the required materials please feel free to just send an email! 

We would love to welcome student actresses as we are students ourselves. This is an amazing opportunity to work overseas and work with students from a major film school!

Copy of the film, IMDB credits and keeping the catwoman costume is included as additional benefits on top of the pay and other expenses covered. You will also be invited to any film festivals or award ceremonies should this film be completed and successful in winning any awards.

Filming dates will be July 3rd to July 5th, with a rest day in between.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.
